sharc
Documentation développeur
DivKGradLScheme.h
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 #ifndef DIVKGRADLSCHEME_H
3 #define DIVKGRADLSCHEME_H
4 
5 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
6 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
7 #include <arcane/IMeshSubMeshTransition.h>
8 #include <arcane/VariableTypedef.h>
9 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
10 
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/CoefficientArrayBuilder.h"
12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/Comparator.h"
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/IDivKGradOLGSchemes.h"
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/DivKGradOLGSchemesImpl/DivKGradLSchemeStencils.h"
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Utils/Algorithms/LUSolver.h"
16 
17 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/OperatorImplementation.h"
18 
19 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 
22 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
23  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
24 class DivKGradLScheme
25  : public IDivKGradOLGSchemes<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
26  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
27 {
28 public:
29  typedef DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
30  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder> ThisClass;
31 
32  typedef IDivKGradOLGSchemes<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
33  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder> BaseClass;
34 
35  typedef TCellStencilBuilder CellStencilBuilderType;
36  typedef TFaceStencilBuilder FaceStencilBuilderType;
37  typedef TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder CellCoefficientArrayBuilderType;
38  typedef TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder FaceCoefficientArrayBuilderType;
39 
40 private:
41  typedef typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder::Initializer CellCoefficientArrayInitializer;
42  typedef typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder::Initializer FaceCoefficientArrayInitializer;
43 
44  typedef typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder::Inserter CellCoefficientArrayInserter;
45  typedef typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder::Inserter FaceCoefficientArrayInserter;
46 
47  typedef typename BaseClass::CellNum CellNum;
48  typedef typename BaseClass::FaceNum FaceNum;
49  typedef typename BaseClass::FaceNumByCell FaceNumByCell;
50 
51 public:
52  DivKGradLScheme(ITraceMng * a_trace_mng)
53  : m_trace_mng(a_trace_mng)
54  {
55  // do nothing
56  }
57 
59  template<Integer N, typename VariableTypeT>
60  void formDiscreteOperatorT(const VariableTypeT & kappa);
61 
62 protected:
63  friend struct OperatorImplementationT<OperatorImplementationTraitsT<ThisClass>::type>;
64 
65  OperatorImplementationT<OperatorImplementationTraitsT<ThisClass>::type> m_implementation;
66 
67  typedef OperatorImplementationT<OperatorImplementationTraitsT<ThisClass>::type> ImplementationType;
68  typedef typename ImplementationType::ComparatorType ComparatorType;
69 
70 private:
71  boost::shared_ptr<CellCoefficientArrayInitializer> m_cell_ca_initializer;
72  boost::shared_ptr<FaceCoefficientArrayInitializer> m_face_ca_initializer;
73 
74  boost::shared_ptr<CellCoefficientArrayInserter> m_cell_ca_inserter;
75  boost::shared_ptr<FaceCoefficientArrayInserter> m_face_ca_inserter;
76 
77  boost::shared_ptr<ComparatorType> m_degeneration1_comparator;
78  boost::shared_ptr<ComparatorType> m_degeneration2_comparator;
79 
80  ITraceMng * m_trace_mng;
81 
82  // Compute transmissibilities for centered L stencil
83  template<typename VariableTypeT>
84  Byte _compute_trans_centered_stencil(const Node& node,CellNum & NumLocCell,
85  const VariableTypeT & kappa,
86  L_Stencil& centered_stencil);
87 
88  template<typename VariableTypeT>
89  Byte _compute_trans_centered_stencil_amr(const Node& node,CellNum & NumLocCell,
90  ItemVectorT<Cell> node_cells,
91  const VariableTypeT & kappa,
92  L_Stencil& centered_stencil);
93  // Compute discrete operator. N is the space dimension
94  template<Integer N,
95  typename VariableTypeT,
96  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
97  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
98  void _compute_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
99  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
100  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
101  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
102  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator);
103 
104  // Compute discrete operator. "OLD VERSION ", N is the space dimension
105  template<Integer N,
106  typename VariableTypeT,
107  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
108  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
109  void _compute_discrete_operator_(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
110  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
111  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
112  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
113  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator);
114 
115  // Compute discrete operator. "AMR", N is the space dimension
116  template<Integer N,
117  typename VariableTypeT,
118  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
119  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
120  void _compute_discrete_operator_amr(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
121  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
122  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
123  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
124  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator);
125 
126 };
127 
128 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
129 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
130 
131 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
132  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
133 template<Integer N, typename VariableTypeT>
134 void DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
135  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
136 formDiscreteOperatorT(const VariableTypeT & kappa)
137 {
138 
139  ImplementationType::template apply<N, ThisClass, VariableTypeT>(this, kappa);
140  this->m_status |= DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_FORMED;
141 }
142 
143 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
144 
145 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
146  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
147 template<typename VariableTypeT>
148 Byte DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
149  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
150 _compute_trans_centered_stencil(const Node& node,
151  CellNum & NumLocCell,
152  const VariableTypeT & kappa,
153  L_Stencil& centered_stencil)
154 {
155  typedef typename VariableTraitsT<VariableTypeT>::DataType DiffusionType;
156 
157  Integer N = 3;
158  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type A(N, N);
159  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type B(N, N+1);
160  A.clear();
161  B.clear();
162 
163  const Cell & K = node.cell(centered_stencil.getCell(0));
164  const DiffusionType& LambdaK = kappa[K];
165  Real3 xK = (*this->m_c_centers)[K];
166 
167  // Generate the system for the gradient recovery on the central cell
168  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++){
169  const Face & face = node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i));
170  //internal face
171  if (!face.isSubDomainBoundary()){
172  const Cell& L = node.cell(centered_stencil.getCell(i+1));
173  const DiffusionType& LambdaL = kappa[L];
174  Real3 xL = (*this->m_c_centers)[L];
175  Real3 xKL = xL - xK;
176  Real3 normalK, normalL;
177  //get the unit normals
178  if (face.backCell() == K){
179  normalK = (*this->m_f_normals)[face]/(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
180  normalL = -normalK;
181  }
182  else{
183  normalL = (*this->m_f_normals)[face]/(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
184  normalK = -normalL;
185  }
186  Real3 Lam_Kn_K = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaK,normalK);
187  Real3 Lam_Ln_L = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaL,normalL);
188  Real d_L_sigma = math::abs(math::scaMul(xKL, normalK));
189  Real k = math::scaMul(Lam_Ln_L, normalL)/d_L_sigma;
190  Real3 row = k*xKL + Lam_Kn_K + Lam_Ln_L;
191  A(i,0) = row.x;
192  A(i,1) = row.y;
193  A(i,2) = row.z;
194  B(i,i+1) = k;
195  B(i,0) = -k;
196  }
197  // boundary face
198  else{
199  Real3 x_sigma = (*this->m_f_centers)[face];
200  Real3 row= x_sigma - xK;
201  A(i,0) = row.x;
202  A(i,1) = row.y;
203  A(i,2) = row.z;
204  B(i,i+1) = 1.;
205  B(i,0) = -1.;
206  }
207  }
208 
209  // Find the gradient
210  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type Grad(B);
211  LUSolver<Real> lu;
212  try
213  {
214  lu.factor(A);
215  lu.overwrite_solve(Grad); //Grad=A^{-1}B
216  }
217  catch(LUSolver<Real>::Error e){//Exceptional case when the matrix is singular
218  m_trace_mng->fatal() << e.msg;
219  // return 0;
220  }
221  // Check if the matrix is very close to singular
222  Real det = lu.det();
223  Real Max = 0.;
224  for (std::size_t i = 0 ; i < A.size1() ; i++){
225  for (std::size_t j = 0 ; j < A.size2() ; j++){
226  Max = math::max(Max,math::abs(A(i,j)));
227  }
228  }
229  //Scale the determinant
230  det /= Max;
231  if (math::abs(det)<1e-8){
232  return 0;
233  }
234 
235  // Compute Lambda*gradient
236  SharedArray<Real3> LambdaGradient(4);
237  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < 4 ; i++){
238  Real3 column;
239  column.x = Grad(0,i);
240  column.y = Grad(1,i);
241  column.z = Grad(2,i);
242  LambdaGradient[i] = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaK,column);
243  }
244 
245  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++){
246  const Face & face = node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i));
247  Real3 normal = (*this->m_f_normals)[face];
248  if (face.isSubDomainBoundary() && !face.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside())
249  normal = -normal;
250  for (Integer j = 0 ; j < 4 ; j++){
251  centered_stencil.transm[i][j] = math::scaMul(LambdaGradient[j], normal);
252  }
253  }
254  return 1;
255 }
256 
257 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
258 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
259 
260 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
261  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
262 template<typename VariableTypeT>
263 Byte DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
264  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
265 _compute_trans_centered_stencil_amr(const Node& node,
266  CellNum & NumLocCell,
267  ItemVectorT<Cell> node_cells,
268  const VariableTypeT & kappa,
269  L_Stencil& centered_stencil)
270 {
271  typedef typename VariableTraitsT<VariableTypeT>::DataType DiffusionType;
272 
273  Integer N = 3;
274  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type A(N, N);
275  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type B(N, N+1);
276  A.clear();
277  B.clear();
278 
279  const Cell & K = node_cells[centered_stencil.getCell(0)];//node.cell(centered_stencil.getCell(0));
280  const DiffusionType& LambdaK = kappa[K];
281  Real3 xK = (*this->m_c_centers)[K];
282 
283  // Generate the system for the gradient recovery on the central cell
284  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++){
285  const Face & face = node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i));
286  //internal face
287  if (!face.isSubDomainBoundary()){
288  const Cell& L = node_cells[centered_stencil.getCell(i+1)];//node.cell(centered_stencil.getCell(i+1));
289  const DiffusionType& LambdaL = kappa[L];
290  Real3 xL = (*this->m_c_centers)[L];
291  Real3 xKL = xL - xK;
292  Real3 normalK, normalL;
293  //get the unit normals
294  // Real test =(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
295  if (face.backCell() == K){
296  normalK = (*this->m_f_normals)[face]/(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
297  normalL = -normalK;
298  }
299  else{
300  normalL = (*this->m_f_normals)[face]/(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
301  normalK = -normalL;
302  }
303  Real3 Lam_Kn_K = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaK,normalK);
304  Real3 Lam_Ln_L = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaL,normalL);
305  Real d_L_sigma = math::abs(math::scaMul(xKL, normalK));
306  Real k = math::scaMul(Lam_Ln_L, normalL)/d_L_sigma;
307  Real3 row = k*xKL + Lam_Kn_K + Lam_Ln_L;
308  A(i,0) = row.x;
309  A(i,1) = row.y;
310  A(i,2) = row.z;
311  B(i,i+1) = k;
312  B(i,0) = -k;
313  }
314  // boundary face
315  else{
316  Real3 x_sigma = (*this->m_f_centers)[face];
317  Real3 row= x_sigma - xK;
318  A(i,0) = row.x;
319  A(i,1) = row.y;
320  A(i,2) = row.z;
321  B(i,i+1) = 1.;
322  B(i,0) = -1.;
323  }
324  }
325 
326  // Find the gradient
327  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type Grad(B);
328  LUSolver<Real> lu;
329  try
330  {
331  lu.factor(A);
332  lu.overwrite_solve(Grad); //Grad=A^{-1}B
333  }
334  catch(LUSolver<Real>::Error e){//Exceptional case when the matrix is singular
335  m_trace_mng->fatal() << e.msg;
336  // return 0;
337  }
338  // Check if the matrix is very close to singular
339  Real det = lu.det();
340  Real Max = 0.;
341  for (std::size_t i = 0 ; i < A.size1() ; i++){
342  for (std::size_t j = 0 ; j < A.size2() ; j++){
343  Max = math::max(Max,math::abs(A(i,j)));
344  }
345  }
346  //Scale the determinant
347  det /= Max;
348  if (math::abs(det)<1e-8){
349  return 0;
350  }
351 
352  // Compute Lambda*gradient
353  SharedArray<Real3> LambdaGradient(4);
354  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < 4 ; i++){
355  Real3 column;
356  column.x = Grad(0,i);
357  column.y = Grad(1,i);
358  column.z = Grad(2,i);
359  LambdaGradient[i] = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaK,column);
360  }
361 
362  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++){
363  const Face & face = node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i));
364  Real3 normal = (*this->m_f_normals)[face];
365  if (face.isSubDomainBoundary() && !face.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside())
366  normal = -normal;
367  for (Integer j = 0 ; j < 4 ; j++){
368  centered_stencil.transm[i][j] = math::scaMul(LambdaGradient[j], normal);
369  }
370  }
371  return 1;
372 }
373 
374 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
375 
376 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
377  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
378 template<Integer N,
379  typename VariableTypeT,
380  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
381  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
382 void DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
383  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
384 _compute_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
385  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
386  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
387  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
388  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator)
389 {
390 
391  if(this->m_amr)
392  _compute_discrete_operator_amr< N, VariableTypeT, CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
393  Degeneration1Comparator, Degeneration2Comparator>
394  (kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder,
395  degeneration1_comparator, degeneration2_comparator);
396  else
397  _compute_discrete_operator_< N, VariableTypeT, CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
398  Degeneration1Comparator, Degeneration2Comparator>
399  (kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder,
400  degeneration1_comparator, degeneration2_comparator);
401 
402 }
403 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
404 
405 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
406  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
407 template<Integer N,
408  typename VariableTypeT,
409  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
410  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
411 void DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
412  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
413 _compute_discrete_operator_(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
414  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
415  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
416  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
417  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator)
418 {
419  ARCANE_ASSERT( (this->m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
420  ("Operator not prepared") );
421 
422 
423 
424  // Retrieve geometric properties
425  this->m_f_centers = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
426  this->m_f_normals = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
427  this->m_f_measures = &this->m_geometry_service->getRealVariableProperty(this->m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
428  this->m_c_centers = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_cells, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
429 
430  Integer MaxFaceId = this->m_mesh->faceFamily()->maxLocalId();
431 
432  // Internal nodes
433  CellNum & NumLocCell = *(this->m_cell_numbering);
434 
435  VariableNodeReal3 coords = PRIMARYMESH_CAST(this->m_mesh)->nodesCoordinates();
436  SharedArray<Integer> non_sing_stenc(MaxFaceId);
437  non_sing_stenc.fill(0);
438  SharedArray<Integer> non_boun_nodes(MaxFaceId);
439  non_boun_nodes.fill(0);
440 
441  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_internal_nodes ) {
442  const Node& node = *inode;
443 
444  //Allocation du vecteur
445  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
446  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node.nbCell());
447 
448  this->_compute_local_connectivity(node, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
449  //Calculate the number of stencils
450  Integer NumStencils = 0;
451  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < node.nbCell() ; i++){
452  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[i].size() == 3){
453  NumStencils ++;
454  }
455  else{
456  NumStencils += 4;
457  }
458  }
459 
460  //Initialize the centered stencils
461  L_Stencil **centered_stencils;
462  centered_stencils = new L_Stencil*[NumStencils];
463  //Compute the transmissibilities
464  SharedArray<Byte> stencil_non_degenerate(NumStencils);
465  Integer ist = 0;
466  for (Integer icell=0 ; icell<node.nbCell() ; ++icell){
467  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[icell].size() == 3){
468  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
469  stencil_non_degenerate[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, NumLocCell, kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
470  ist++;
471  }
472  else{ // Case of pyramid vertex
473  for (Integer iface = 0 ; iface < 4 ; iface++){
474  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, iface, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
475  stencil_non_degenerate[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, NumLocCell, kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
476  ist++;
477  }
478  }
479  }
480  //Calculate the non-boundary nodes of each face (needed for scaling of the flux)
481  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < node.nbFace(); iface++){
482  const Face & face = node.face(iface);
483  non_boun_nodes[face.localId()]++;
484  }
485  //Choose the best stencil for each face
486  SharedArray<Integer> FaceToRow(node.nbFace());
487  SharedArray<Integer> Stencil_Number(node.nbFace());
488  SharedArray<Real> FaceIndicator(node.nbFace()); // the main parameter (d1-d2) in choosing the proper stencil
489  Stencil_Number.fill(NumStencils);
490 
491  for ( ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils ; ++ist) { //loop over the stencils
492  if (stencil_non_degenerate[ist]){
493  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < 3 ; iface++){
494  Real diff = math::abs(centered_stencils[ist]->transm[iface][0] - centered_stencils[ist]->transm[iface][iface+1]);
495  Integer locnbface = centered_stencils[ist]->getFace(iface);
496  if ((Stencil_Number[locnbface] == NumStencils)||(diff < FaceIndicator[locnbface])){
497  Stencil_Number[locnbface] = ist;
498  FaceIndicator[locnbface] = diff;
499  FaceToRow[locnbface] = iface;
500  }
501  }
502  }
503  }
504  // Retrieve the transmissibilities from the found stencils
505  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < node.nbFace() ; iface++){
506  Integer stencil_num = Stencil_Number[iface];
507  if (stencil_num != NumStencils){
508  for (Integer icell = 0; icell < 4; icell++){
509  cell_ca_builder.subtract(node.face(iface),
510  node.cell(centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell)),
511  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[FaceToRow[iface]][icell]);
512  }
513  non_sing_stenc[node.face(iface).localId()]++;
514  }
515  }
516  for (Integer ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils; ist++)
517  delete centered_stencils[ist];
518  delete[] centered_stencils;
519  }
520 
521  if (this->m_type != TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Lscheme){
522  // Get the proper coefficients
523  SharedArray<Real> weight_normalize(MaxFaceId);
524  weight_normalize.fill(0.);
525  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_internal_faces){
526  const Face & F = *iface;
527  Integer nbnodes = F.nbNode();
528  if (non_sing_stenc[F.localId()]){
529  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = static_cast<Real>(non_boun_nodes[F.localId()]) / (nbnodes * non_sing_stenc[F.localId()]);
530  }
531  else
532  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = 1.;
533  }
534 
535  // Normalization of transmissibilities
536  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_internal_faces){
537  const Face & F = *iface;
538  ItemVectorView c_stencilF = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencil(F);
539  Integer c_st_size = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
540  for (Integer i = 0; i < c_st_size ; i++){
541  const Cell & cell = c_stencilF[i].toCell();
542  // this->m_cell_coefficients->coefficient(F, cell) *= weight_normalize[F.localId()];
543  cell_ca_builder.multiply(F, cell, weight_normalize[F.localId()]);
544  }
545  }
546  }
547 
548  // Boundary faces
549  switch(this->m_type) {
550  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Lscheme : {
551  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_boundary_nodes ) {
552  const Node& node = *inode;
553  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
554  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node.nbCell());
555  this->_compute_local_connectivity(node,NumLocCell,NumLocfacesbyCell);
556 
557  //Calculate the number of stencils
558  Integer NumStencils = 0;
559  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < node.nbCell() ; i++){
560  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[i].size() == 3){
561  NumStencils ++;
562  }
563  else{
564  NumStencils += 4;
565  }
566  }
567 
568  //Initialize the centered stencils
569  SharedArray<Byte> stencil_non_degenerate(NumStencils);
570  L_Stencil **centered_stencils;
571  centered_stencils = new L_Stencil*[NumStencils];
572 
573  //Compute the transmissibilities
574  Integer ist = 0;
575  for (Integer icell=0 ; icell<node.nbCell() ; ++icell){
576  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[icell].size() == 3){
577  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
578  stencil_non_degenerate[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, NumLocCell, kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
579  ist++;
580  }
581  else{ // Case of pyramid vertex
582  for (Integer iface = 0 ; iface < 4 ; iface++){
583  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, iface, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
584  stencil_non_degenerate[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, NumLocCell, kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
585  ist++;
586  }
587  }
588  }
589 
590  //Choose the best stencil for each face
591  SharedArray<Integer> FaceToRow(node.nbFace());
592  SharedArray<Integer> Stencil_Number(node.nbFace());
593  SharedArray<Real> FaceIndicator(node.nbFace()); // the main parameter (d1-d2) in choosing the proper stencil
594  Stencil_Number.fill(NumStencils);
595  for ( ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils ; ++ist) { //loop over the stencils
596  if (stencil_non_degenerate[ist]){
597  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < 3 ; iface++){
598  Real diff = math::abs(centered_stencils[ist]->transm[iface][0] - centered_stencils[ist]->transm[iface][iface+1]);
599  Integer locnbface = centered_stencils[ist]->getFace(iface);
600  if ((Stencil_Number[locnbface] == NumStencils)||(diff < FaceIndicator[locnbface])){
601  Stencil_Number[locnbface] = ist;
602  FaceIndicator[locnbface] = diff;
603  FaceToRow[locnbface] = iface;
604  }
605  }
606  }
607  }
608 
609  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < node.nbFace() ; iface++){
610  Integer stencil_num = Stencil_Number[iface];
611  if (stencil_num != NumStencils){
612  for (Integer icell = 0; icell < 4; icell++){
613  Integer num_cell = centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell);
614  if (num_cell == -1){
615  face_ca_builder.subtract(node.face(iface),
616  node.face(centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getFace(icell-1)),
617  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[FaceToRow[iface]][icell]);
618  }
619  else{
620  cell_ca_builder.subtract(node.face(iface),
621  node.cell(centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell)),
622  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[FaceToRow[iface]][icell]);
623  }
624  }
625  non_sing_stenc[node.face(iface).localId()]++;
626  }
627  }
628  for (Integer ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils; ist++)
629  delete centered_stencils[ist];
630  delete[] centered_stencils;
631  }
632 
633  // Normalization of transmissibilities
634  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_faces){
635  const Face & F = *iface;
636  ItemVectorView c_stencilF = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencil(F);
637  Integer c_st_size = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
638  for (Integer i = 0; i < c_st_size ; i++){
639  const Cell & cell = c_stencilF[i].toCell();
640  cell_ca_builder.divide(F, cell, non_sing_stenc[F.localId()]);
641  }
642  Integer f_st_size = this->m_face_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
643  if (f_st_size){
644  ItemVectorView f_stencilF = this->m_face_coefficients->stencil(F);
645  for (Integer i = 0; i < f_st_size ; i++){
646  const Face & face = f_stencilF[i].toFace();
647  face_ca_builder.divide(F, face, non_sing_stenc[F.localId()]);
648  }
649  }
650  }
651  break;
652  }
653 
654  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_StandardTwoPoints : {// schema deux points pour les noeuds de bord
655  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_boundary_nodes ) {
656  const Node& node = *inode;
657  this->BaseClass::template _compute_standard_two_point_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
658  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
659  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node, kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
660  }
661  break;
662  }
663  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_TwoPoints : {// schema deux points pour les noeuds de bord
664  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_boundary_nodes ) {
665  const Node& node = *inode;
666  this->BaseClass::template _compute_two_point_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
667  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
668  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node, kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
669  }
670  break;
671  }
672  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Oscheme : {// O-Schema pour les noeuds de bord
673  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_boundary_nodes ) {
674  const Node& node = *inode;
675 
676  //Allocation du vecteur
677  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
678  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node.nbCell());
679 
680  // Pour chaque maille autour du noeud, on calcule Lambda Gradient
681  SharedArray2<Real3> Gradient(node.nbCell(),node.nbFace()+1);
682 
683  this->_compute_local_connectivity(node, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
684  try {
685  TrueComparatorT<bool> true_comparator;
686  this->BaseClass::template
687  _compute_cell_gradient<3, TrueComparatorT<bool> >
688  (node, NumLocfacesbyCell, Gradient, true_comparator) ;
689  this->BaseClass::template _compute_o_scheme_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
690  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
691  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node,
692  NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell, Gradient,
693  kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
694  }
695  catch (typename BaseClass::Error e) {
696  m_trace_mng->fatal() << e.msg;
697  }
698  }
699  break;
700  }
701  default:
702  m_trace_mng->error() << "Unknown boundary condition type";
703  }
704 
705  // this->m_boundary_nodes.clear();
706  // this->m_internal_nodes.clear();
707 }
708 
709 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
710 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
711 
712 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
713  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
714 template<Integer N,
715  typename VariableTypeT,
716  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
717  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
718 void DivKGradLScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
719  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
720 _compute_discrete_operator_amr(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
721  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
722  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
723  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
724  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator)
725 {
726  ARCANE_ASSERT( (this->m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
727  ("Operator not prepared") );
728 
729 
730  // Retrieve geometric properties
731  this->m_f_centers = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_mesh->allActiveFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
732  this->m_f_normals = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_mesh->allActiveFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
733  this->m_f_measures = &this->m_geometry_service->getRealVariableProperty(this->m_mesh->allActiveFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
734  this->m_c_centers = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_mesh->allActiveCells(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
735 
736  Integer MaxFaceId = this->m_mesh->faceFamily()->maxLocalId();
737 
738  // Internal nodes
739  CellNum & NumLocCell = *(this->m_cell_numbering);
740 
741  VariableNodeReal3 coords = PRIMARYMESH_CAST(this->m_mesh)->nodesCoordinates();
742  SharedArray<Integer> non_sing_stenc(MaxFaceId);
743  non_sing_stenc.fill(0);
744  SharedArray<Integer> non_boun_nodes(MaxFaceId);
745  non_boun_nodes.fill(0);
746 
747  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_internal_nodes ) {
748  const Node& node = *inode;
749 
750  ItemVectorT<Cell> node_cells(this->m_mesh->cellFamily());
751  ArcGeoSim::Mesh::amrCells(node, node_cells);
752 
753  //Allocation du vecteur
754  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
755  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node_cells.size());//--
756 
757  this->_compute_local_connectivity_amr(node, node_cells, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
758  //Calculate the number of stencils
759  Integer NumStencils = 0;
760  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < node_cells.size() ; i++){
761  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[i].size() == 3){
762  NumStencils ++;
763  }
764  }
765 
766  //Initialize the centered stencils
767  L_Stencil **centered_stencils;
768  centered_stencils = new L_Stencil*[NumStencils];
769  //Compute the transmissibilities
770  SharedArray<Byte> stencil_non_degenerate(NumStencils);
771  Integer ist = 0;
772  for (Integer icell=0 ; icell<node_cells.size(); ++icell){
773  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[icell].size() == 3){
774  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, node_cells, NumLocCell, NumLocfacesbyCell);
775  stencil_non_degenerate[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil_amr<VariableTypeT>(node, NumLocCell, node_cells, kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
776  ist++;
777  }
778  }
779  //Calculate the non-boundary nodes of each face (needed for scaling of the flux)
780  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < node.nbFace(); iface++){
781  const Face & face = node.face(iface);
782  non_boun_nodes[face.localId()]++;
783  }
784  //Choose the best stencil for each face
785  SharedArray<Integer> FaceToRow(node.nbFace());
786  SharedArray<Integer> Stencil_Number(node.nbFace());
787  SharedArray<Real> FaceIndicator(node.nbFace()); // the main parameter (d1-d2) in choosing the proper stencil
788  Stencil_Number.fill(NumStencils);
789 
790  for ( ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils ; ++ist) { //loop over the stencils
791  if (stencil_non_degenerate[ist]){
792  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < 3 ; iface++){
793  Real diff = math::abs(centered_stencils[ist]->transm[iface][0] - centered_stencils[ist]->transm[iface][iface+1]);
794  Integer locnbface = centered_stencils[ist]->getFace(iface);
795  if ((Stencil_Number[locnbface] == NumStencils)||(diff < FaceIndicator[locnbface])){
796  Stencil_Number[locnbface] = ist;
797  FaceIndicator[locnbface] = diff;
798  FaceToRow[locnbface] = iface;
799  }
800  }
801  }
802  }
803 
804  // Retrieve the transmissibilities from the found stencils
805  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < node.nbFace() ; iface++){
806  Integer stencil_num = Stencil_Number[iface];
807  if (stencil_num != NumStencils){
808  for (Integer icell = 0; icell < 4; icell++){
809  if(ArcGeoSim::Mesh::isActive(node.face(iface)))
810  cell_ca_builder.subtract(node.face(iface),
811  node_cells[centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell)],
812  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[FaceToRow[iface]][icell]);
813  }
814  non_sing_stenc[node.face(iface).localId()]++;
815  }
816  }
817  for (Integer ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils; ist++)
818  delete centered_stencils[ist];
819  delete[] centered_stencils;
820  }
821 /*
822  if (this->m_type != TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Lscheme){
823  // Get the proper coefficients
824  Array<Real> weight_normalize(MaxFaceId);
825  weight_normalize.fill(0.);
826  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_internal_faces){
827  const Face & F = *iface;
828  Integer nbnodes = F.nbNode();
829  if (non_sing_stenc[F.localId()]){
830  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = static_cast<Real>(non_boun_nodes[F.localId()]) / (nbnodes * non_sing_stenc[F.localId()]);
831  }
832  else
833  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = 1.;
834  }
835 
836  // Normalization of transmissibilities
837  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_internal_faces){
838  const Face & F = *iface;
839  ItemVectorView c_stencilF = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencil(F);
840  Integer c_st_size = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
841  for (Integer i = 0; i < c_st_size ; i++){
842  const Cell & cell = c_stencilF[i].toCell();
843  //this->m_cell_coefficients->coefficient(F, cell) *= weight_normalize[F.localId()];
844  //std::cout<<F.localId()<<" MULTIPLY"<<cell.localId()<<"\n";
845  // if(ArcGeoSim::Mesh::isActive(F))
846  // cell_ca_builder.multiply(F, cell, weight_normalize[F.localId()]);
847  }
848  }
849  }
850 */
851  // Boundary faces
852  switch(this->m_type) {
853 
854  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_StandardTwoPoints : {// schema deux points pour les noeuds de bord
855  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_boundary_nodes ) {
856  const Node& node = *inode;
857  //std::cout<<"BC_StandardTwoPoints S.Y."<<"\n";
858  this->BaseClass::template _compute_standard_two_point_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
859  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
860  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node, kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
861  }
862  break;
863  }
864  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_TwoPoints : {// schema deux points pour les noeuds de bord
865  ENUMERATE_NODE( inode, this->m_boundary_nodes ) {
866  const Node& node = *inode;
867  this->BaseClass::template _compute_two_point_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
868  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
869  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node, kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
870  }
871  break;
872  }
873  default:
874  m_trace_mng->error() << "Unknown boundary condition type : only TP is accepted for AMR";
875 
876  }
877 
878  // this->m_boundary_nodes.clear();
879  // this->m_internal_nodes.clear();
880 }
881 
882 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
883 
884 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
885 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
886 
887 #endif
DivKGradLScheme
Definition: DivKGradLScheme.h:27
DivKGradLScheme::formDiscreteOperatorT
void formDiscreteOperatorT(const VariableTypeT &kappa)
Form discrete operator. N is the space dimension.
Definition: DivKGradLScheme.h:136
IDivKGradOLGSchemes
Definition: IDivKGradOLGSchemes.h:46
IGeometryMng::getRealVariableProperty
virtual const RealVariable & getRealVariableProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)=0
Get geometric property values for a Real field.
IGeometryMng::getReal3VariableProperty
virtual const Real3Variable & getReal3VariableProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)=0
Get geometric property values for a Real3 field.
LUSolver
Solve the linear system using the factorization.
Definition: LUSolver.h:51
LUSolver::matrix_type
ublas::matrix< T, ublas::column_major > matrix_type
Internal matrix type.
Definition: LUSolver.h:82
LUSolver::overwrite_solve
void overwrite_solve(ublas::vector_expression< E > &b)
Solve the linear system for a single rhs and overwrite the solution.
Definition: LUSolver.h:244
LUSolver::factor
int factor(const ublas::matrix_expression< E > &A)
Copy and factor the matrix.
Definition: LUSolver.h:168
L_Stencil
Definition: GradM-LStencils.h:10
DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED
@ S_PREPARED
Service initialized.
Definition: DiscreteOperatorProperty.h:38
DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_FORMED
@ S_FORMED
Service prepared.
Definition: DiscreteOperatorProperty.h:39
DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod
Definition: TensorAlgebra.h:36
LUSolver::Error
Definition: LUSolver.h:73
OperatorImplementationT
Definition: OperatorImplementation.h:33
OperatorImplementationTraitsT
Definition: OperatorImplementation.h:50
TrueComparatorT
Definition: Comparator.h:19
TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Oscheme
@ BC_Oscheme
Standard two point method for boundary faces.
Definition: TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes.h:9
TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_StandardTwoPoints
@ BC_StandardTwoPoints
Modified two point method for boundary faces to recover consistency on CPG grids.
Definition: TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes.h:8
TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Lscheme
@ BC_Lscheme
O method for boundary faces.
Definition: TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes.h:10
VariableTraitsT
Definition: DiscreteOperatorProperty.h:49
  • common
  • ArcGeoSim
  • src
  • ArcGeoSim
  • Numerics
  • DiscreteOperator
  • DivKGradOLGSchemesImpl
  • DivKGradLScheme.h
  • Generated by 1.9.1
